items.title: Buzzr — real-time AI quiz platform
items.description: Generate a full quiz from one AI prompt, then host it live — real-time gameplay and leaderboards over WebSockets. Battle-tested with ~200 concurrent players at a college event.

items.title: Tweeter — full-stack social platform
items.description: A Twitter-style social app with OAuth, customizable profiles, tweets, and real-time chat over WebSockets — designed and built across the full stack.

items.title: Scrolls — national paper-submission platform
items.description: A national-level platform for technical paper submissions — 600+ registrations, 200+ teams, and 150+ synopsis submissions, secured with Google v3 Captcha.

items.title: Edumate — school management ERP
items.description: A three-panel ERP for schools — admin, faculty, and student portals with dashboards, attendance tracking, events, and feedback.
